title: 日本ダービーの後に・一難去って…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru makes a brilliant showing at
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She breathes a sigh of relief, thinking her next
race will not be as difficult, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fate decides her next challenge will be the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The thought of another large-scale challenge has
Matikanefukukitaru shrieking with dismay.
